intro: Calonema roei, also known as the Red Calonema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and boost the immune system.
